home.title: whispers of time
subtitleLines: to my love and best friend.
gonna be a long read but i hope you enjoy this gift!

entries.text:
HAPPY BIRTHDAY BABYYYYY!!!!!!!!!! i actually started working on this since i last visited you in january so i was surprised to say the least when you gifted me a website for valentines day (you totally stole my idea (i’m just kidding i loved that website so much)). highkey took wayyy longer than it should have but i’ve just been adding bits here and there over time to give you what i think are some of our best moments and some inner thoughts! i love you so much and you'll always be my sweet girl. i hope i reach your standard in literacy and poetry and i hope you enjoy your gifts too :) there's a song for each page so hit play and read through at your own pace <3

but seriously, not only am i so proud of you but also that i get to call you mine. i'm so grateful that i got to live this past year with you and i'm excited to see how we keep growing.

love,
yours (aka Daniel)

gallery.title: our memories
gallery.subtitle:
we've come so far even when we didn't know it
click to reveal!

items.caption: totally not a date O_O but i had such a fun time with you

senior core
crazy day in our senior year and we had sm fun with mc uno too

the fair!
i was so nervous that it was just us two but it went so well and i'm glad that everyone else was a bum
my fav starfish and fire recordings for our physics C music video
your smile is so cutieeee you were so beautiful and i loved the photos i managed to take of you

that day was so vibes. just laying in the grass, making the lanterns and watching them float away, talking about everything but also sitting together in comfortable silence. and ofc aiden and maia were cool too ig (jokes love them)
i love just dilly dallying together
my cutie's cutie. we WILL finish that puzzle......

items.title: lines from our favorite game
lines: and the universe said i love you
and the universe said you are stronger than you know
and the universe said you are the daylight
and the universe said you are the night
and the universe said i love you because you are love.

items.title: my pretty girl
lines: i hope i make you feel like the most special girl in the world.
the most beautiful, the smartest, the most talented.
i hope i’m a person you can call home,
a person you can be proud to call yours,
and lovingly hold my hand.

items.title: one time
lines: there was a time we didn't know each other.
can you believe that?
anything i see i make a connection back to you.
i want to tell you about every little thing,
i want to hug you anytime i'm sad or happy.
but now that you're mine,
i can't imagine a life without you.
even if we're apart for most of it,
i'm glad i get to call you mine and that i get to be yours.

items.title: my kind of love
lines: when someone asks me what love is,
i imagine your face.
the way you smile and laugh,
how you softly hold my face,
and how you look at me with joy.
the way you talk about your day on call,
reassure me when i'm down,
and just cuddle with me in quiet.

items.title: lunar
lines: pretty like the moon,
always there but sometimes out of sight.
how pretty you are in my eyes.
but i could stare at you for hours,
ignore the sunset view.
because why watch the sun fall and the moon rise?
when i'm already watching you.

items.title: all yours
lines: i would tie your shoes,
dry your hair if you're tired,
buy you snacks at midnight,
peel oranges for you while we talk,
answer your rage baiting questions,
hug you tight every time i see you.
compliment you every day,
drive to duke to see you for a couple days.
i would try anything for you,
because everything can be fun with you.

items.title: separate
lines: you will always be you,
and i will always be me.
forever separate and never the same.
but i hope you never forget,
that i am yours and you are mine.
and that i will always be here for you.

items.title: opia
lines: "the ambigious intensity of eye contact."
from the dictionary of obscure sorrows,
three years ago this was one of my favorite words.
sometimes when i look in your eyes,
i can't tell what you're feeling or thinking.
but what i do know is that your gaze is one of my favorites.
and i'll drive five hours just to look into your eyes,
talking about our days or even one centimeter apart in silence.

items.title: the depths
lines: so many feelings and thoughts,
but so little i could do to show it.
i hope you know that i love you so much,
and that even if i'm busy, tired, or stressed,
i always care about you and just wish i could end the day with you.
and even though you may not remember,
i'll hold your hand as we walk through the water together,
without knowing how deep the water truly is.

items.title: i'd wish to kiss you more by xndr
lines: even when we say goodbye or goodnight i wish i could kiss you more. just one last kiss before i have to leave. just one last kiss before i have to wait to see you again.

items.title: ur so pretty by Wasia Project
lines: you're so pretty :) even when you don't think so, i'll repeat it over and over till you do. let's keep making memories together and i'll never stop telling you how pretty you are.

items.title: stars burn out by cykim, justin
lines: "if the stars burn out, i'll find you in the dark." and even when you're burnt out, you glow in my heart. when you shine you fill my world. i'll love you always, dimmed or bright.

items.title: Rearrange My World by Daniel Caesar
lines: lucky to have someone else to call home, someone to love, and a smile i'll always hope to see in my dreams

items.title: Greed by Jiwoo
lines: one of the first songs that reminded me of you. i felt greedy for how much i wanted you but couldn’t bring myself to tell you about it just to keep the illusion of peace in both of our individual lives. but now we’re intertwined and i couldn’t be happier.

entries.text:
dear Katherine (my baby),

surprise o_o didn’t expect this did you hahahahah but happy anniversary my love :) i can’t believe we’ve already been dating for a year, but i guess at the same time i also can’t believe it’s only been a year! we’ve only physically been together for a fraction of the year but every time i get to see you again we make new memories and i love you even more. i still can't believe that we somehow ended up being physics partners and i developed a crazzyyy crush on you hahahaha and it was even crazier when you asked if i could go to prom with you. even when you came to coffeehouse, you really made my day because i really didn't expect you to actually show up. i really just invited you just to have something more to say to you. and of course we can't forget beach week. the butterflies i felt texting you, holding your hand, and suppperr sneakily wearing your hairtie. you made my highschool senior year a dream and now i keep wanting to see you in my dreams. even though you're gone for a good chunk of summer, let's keep making memories knowing that this isn't a fleeting summer moment of "what might be" but instead adding another day, another memory to our story.

the future is crazy scary but i can confidently say that i’ll always love you and i’ll always try my best for you, myself, and for us. even though we weren't able to be together and do something for our actual anniversary, i hope you enjoyed this website and i hope i get to keep making things for you! and especially i hope you have fun in the islands :)

i love you,
Daniel (aka yours)
